data.name: Hero Brand
data.description: Full-bleed hero with background image, heading, description, and CTA buttons.

data.name: Cards — Category
data.description: Side-by-side category cards with image, title, description, and CTA links.

data.name: Columns — Feature
data.description: Two-column layout with text content on the left and a feature image on the right.

data.name: Cards — Bento
data.description: Bento grid of mixed cards: image+text, text-only, and image-only tiles.

data.name: Cards — Promo
data.description: Promotional offer cards with image overlay showing price/amount, date ranges, and CTAs.

data.name: Columns — Showcase
data.description: Two-column showcase with large image on the left and text content on the right.

data.name: Cards — Article
data.description: Article preview cards with image, title, category label, reading time, and excerpt. Entire card is clickable.

data.name: Cards — Support
data.description: Support category cards with eyebrow text, title, description, and action links.
